Operation 'createTransaction' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too minimal. Added clarity about what transaction details are expected, what identifier is returned, and that the transaction is persisted. This helps AI agents understand the operation's purpose, inputs, outputs, and side effects.

data.description_suggestion: Creates a new transaction record in the NetLicensing system. Accepts transaction details such as licensee, license template, and transaction type in the request body. Returns the created transaction object with a unique transactionNumber identifier. The transaction is immediately persisted and available for retrieval.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal. Added clarity about what transaction details are expected, what identifier is returned, and that the transaction is persisted. This helps AI agents understand the operation's purpose, inputs, outputs, and side effects.

message: Operation 'updateTransaction' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description lacks specificity about which transaction is being updated and how partial updates work. Enhanced version clarifies the transactionNumber parameter requirement, explains partial update behavior, and confirms the return value. This improves AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Sets the provided properties to a Transaction. Return an updated Transaction
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing transaction identified by transactionNumber with the provided properties. Accepts transaction properties in the request body to modify. Supports partial updates - only provided fields will be modified. Returns the updated transaction object reflecting all changes.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about which transaction is being updated and how partial updates work. Enhanced version clarifies the transactionNumber parameter requirement, explains partial update behavior, and confirms the return value. This improves AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.
